benchmark_launch_env_effective_nonsecret.cmd:
set -a
. ./.env
set +a
export AZURE_CHAT_ENDPOINT="https://sector-7.services.ai.azure.com/models"
export AZURE_CHAT_DEPLOYMENT="gpt-4.1-mini"
export ANSWER_MODEL="gpt-4.1-mini"
export JUDGE_MODEL="gpt-4.1-mini"
export CHAT_MODEL="gpt-4.1-mini"
export AZURE_EMBEDDING_ENDPOINT="https://sector-7.openai.azure.com/"
export AZURE_EMBEDDING_DEPLOYMENT="text-embedding-3-small"
export INCLUDE_RECALL_TELEMETRY=1
export USE_QUERY_EXPANSION=1
python3 - <<'PY'
import os
for k in ['AZURE_CHAT_ENDPOINT','AZURE_CHAT_DEPLOYMENT','ANSWER_MODEL','JUDGE_MODEL','CHAT_MODEL','AZURE_EMBEDDING_ENDPOINT','AZURE_EMBEDDING_DEPLOYMENT','INCLUDE_RECALL_TELEMETRY','USE_QUERY_EXPANSION','USE_CONTEXT_RERANK','USE_APPEND_CONTEXT_EXPANSION','USE_GATED_APPEND_CONTEXT_EXPANSION','USE_LEGACY_CONTEXT_ASSEMBLY']:
    print(f'{k}={os.environ.get(k, "") }')
PY

container_env_redacted.cmd: docker exec memibrium-server env | sort | grep -E '^(USE_RUVECTOR|AZURE_|OPENAI_|EMBEDDING_|CHAT_MODEL|RUVECTOR_|SLM_MODEL)=' | sed -E 's/(KEY|TOKEN|PASSWORD|SECRET)=.*/\1=[REDACTED]/; s/(API_KEY=).*/\1[REDACTED]/'

db_probe.cmd: docker exec memibrium-ruvector-db psql -U memory -d memory -tA -F '|' -c "SELECT 'locomo_count', count(id) FROM memories WHERE domain LIKE 'locomo-%' UNION ALL SELECT 'ruvector_type_count', count(*) FROM pg_type WHERE typname='ruvector' UNION ALL SELECT 'vector_type_count', count(*) FROM pg_type WHERE typname='vector' UNION ALL SELECT 'embedding_type', count(*) FROM information_schema.columns WHERE table_name='memories' AND column_name='embedding' AND udt_name='ruvector';"

host_embedding_deployment_dimension_prob.cmd:
set -a
. ./.env
set +a
python3 - <<'PY'
import os, httpx, json
endpoint=(os.environ.get('AZURE_EMBEDDING_ENDPOINT') or '').rstrip('/')
deployment=os.environ.get('AZURE_EMBEDDING_DEPLOYMENT') or os.environ.get('AZURE_EMBEDDING_MODEL')
key=os.environ.get('AZURE_EMBEDDING_API_KEY') or os.environ.get('AZURE_OPENAI_API_KEY') or os.environ.get('OPENAI_API_KEY')
api_version=os.environ.get('AZURE_API_VERSION') or '2024-06-01'
print('deployment=' + str(deployment))
if endpoint and deployment and key:
    url=f"{endpoint}/openai/deployments/{deployment}/embeddings?api-version={api_version}"
    r=httpx.post(url, headers={'api-key':key, 'Content-Type':'application/json'}, json={'input':'locomo substrate dimension probe'}, timeout=30)
    print('status=' + str(r.status_code))
    if r.status_code == 200:
        data=r.json(); emb=data['data'][0]['embedding']; print('dimension=' + str(len(emb)))
    else:
        print('response=' + r.text[:500])
else:
    print('missing_required_embedding_env')
PY

host_env_effective_redacted_nonsecret_af.cmd:
set -a
. ./.env
set +a
python3 - <<'PY'
import os
keys=['USE_RUVECTOR','AZURE_EMBEDDING_DEPLOYMENT','AZURE_EMBEDDING_ENDPOINT','AZURE_CHAT_DEPLOYMENT','AZURE_CHAT_ENDPOINT','AZURE_OPENAI_DEPLOYMENT','AZURE_OPENAI_ENDPOINT','CHAT_MODEL','EMBEDDING_MODEL','EMBEDDING_BASE_URL']
for k in keys:
    v=os.environ.get(k,'')
    print(f'{k}={v}')
PY

locomo_count.cmd: docker exec memibrium-ruvector-db psql -U memory -d memory -tA -c "SELECT count(id) FROM memories WHERE domain LIKE 'locomo-%';"

source_feature_probe.cmd: docker exec memibrium-server python3 -c "from pathlib import Path; text=Path('/app/hybrid_retrieval.py').read_text(); server=Path('/app/server.py').read_text(); bench=Path('/app/benchmark_scripts/locomo_bench_v2.py').read_text(); print('hardcoded_vector_cast_present=' + str('\$1::vector' in text)); print('dynamic_vtype_cast_present=' + str('\$1::{self.vtype}' in text)); print('decimal_import_present=' + str('from decimal import Decimal' in server)); print('server_include_telemetry_present=' + str('include_telemetry' in server)); print('bench_include_recall_telemetry_present=' + str('INCLUDE_RECALL_TELEMETRY' in bench));"
